not the bambi story of the deer  
this review conveys a positive sentiment. the reviewer expresses enthusiasm for the book, stating that they thought they were getting the story of the deer but were actually introduced to a different narrative. the reviewer praises the book for being enthralling and suggests it may be one of the best books they have ever read. they also mention that they will read it again when they are older, indicating a strong positive opinion.

this book is about a young adult named bambina (bambi for short) and the reviewer acknowledges that it is not the same as the classic bambi story by felix salten. they also mention that they have not read the entire book, but their positive experience is clear. the reviewer uses five stars to indicate their appreciation, and they suggest that the story should be judged without preconceptions. overall, the review is positive and encouraging.
